sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Cho.
Noel…..Noel… Noel…..Noel…
Itazila Kumpi pa suak.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: A khuadak ciang nisuahna lam ah
Gamlapi pan aksi tang khat kilak
Leitung teng ah nakpi tang hi
Sun le zan ci lo-in
Tang tawntung hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tua aksi pi tang zuikawm in ah
Gamlapi pan mipil thum te in ah
Kumpi zong ding hong pai uh hi
Aksi paina khempeuh hong zui uh hi

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tua aksi’n ni tumna lam naih hi
Bethlehem khuapi tunglam hong naih hi
Tua lai ah aksi pi hong khawl
Jesuh a kisialna tung ah hong khawl

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Mipil thumte zong buk sung lut a
Zahtakna lianpi tawh khukdin uh hi
Kham paknamtui, paknamtui kha
Ama kiang ah pia-in, a bia uh hi
